name: Shodan
description: Imports internet-exposure data from Shodan (https://www.shodan.io). Each host becomes an ASSET (IP, OS), each banner an exposed SERVICE (host:port + product/version), and detected CPEs are linked to the asset. Offline mode: parse a `shodan host <ip>` / `shodan download`+`shodan parse` JSON (a single host object, a JSON-lines banner stream, or `{matches:[...]}`). Live mode: if `query` is set and SHODAN_API_KEY is in the worker env, calls the Shodan search API (needs `pip install requests`). Read-only OSINT (non-intrusive). No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a Shodan JSON (host object, JSON-lines banners, or {matches:[...]}) to import.

parameters.name: query
parameters.help: Live mode: Shodan search query (needs SHODAN_API_KEY in the worker env).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Live mode: maximum number of results to import.
